name: Source Channel
description: How a candidate was discovered or contacted (e.g., LinkedIn Recruiter, Referral, Walk-In).

name: Employment Type
description: How the candidate is engaged when hired (full-time, contract, contract-to-hire, part-time, per-diem).

name: Application Outcome
description: The terminal outcome of an Application: Active, Placed, Rejected, Withdrawn, or Expired.

name: Requisition Status
description: Lifecycle state of a Job Requisition: Open, On Hold, Closed, Filled, or Cancelled.

name: Placement Status
description: Lifecycle state of a Placement: Active or Ended.

name: Stage
description: A pipeline position the candidate moves through (Sourced, Screened, Interviewing, Offer). Pipeline-only; terminal outcomes live on Application.outcome.

name: Client
description: The end-organization where a candidate is placed and the owner of one or more Job Requisitions.

name: Job Requisition
description: A specific open role at a Client, with title, level, employment type, lifecycle status, and open and close dates.

name: Candidate
description: A person being considered for one or more jobs. Identity is keyed on email (case-insensitive) with full name plus primary phone as fallback.

name: Application
description: A candidate's participation in a specific requisition. Carries the current pipeline Stage, the inline stage history, the application source, and the terminal outcome.

name: Placement
description: The success record. A Candidate has been placed into a Job Requisition at a Client. Exists if and only if the corresponding Application's outcome is Placed.
